fragmentation method: ten data-dependent high-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) MS/MS spectra
instrument: using a Q Exactive Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
ionization type: equipped with a Dream Spray nano-electrospray ionization (NSI) source
labeling: samples were analyzed by nano-flow reverse-phase liquid chromatography followed by tandem MS
